name: Argenti
desc: A paragon knight of the Knights of Beauty who is piously seeking his missing Aeon, Idrila the Beauty.\nForthright and candid, he wanders the cosmos espousing the virtues of Idrila's good name.

1.name: A Lacuna in Kingdom of Aesthetics
1.desc: Each stack of Apotheosis additionally increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Agate's Humility
2.desc: If the number of enemies on the field equals to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more when the Ultimate is used, ATK increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Thorny Road's Glory
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Trumpet's Dedication
4.desc: At the start of battle, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Apotheosis and increases the maximum stack limit of the Talent's effect by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

5.name: Snow, From Somewhere in Cosmos
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: "Your" Resplendence
6.desc: When using Ultimate, ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of enemy targets' DEF.

130201.name: Fleeting Fragrance
130201.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Argenti's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130201.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

130202.name: Justice, Hereby Blooms
130202.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Argenti's ATK to all enemies.
130202.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to all enemies.

130203.name: For In This Garden, Supreme Beauty Bestows
130203.desc: Consumes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy and deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Argenti's ATK to all enemies.
130203.simple_desc: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Energy and deals Physical DMG to all enemies.

130204.name: Sublime Object
130204.desc: For every enemy hit when Argenti uses his Basic Attack, Skill, or Ultimate, regenerates Argenti's Energy by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and grants him a stack of Apotheosis, increasing his CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).
130204.simple_desc: When Argenti uses his Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, he <color=#f29e38ff>regenerates Energy</color> and increases his <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT Rate</color> for every enemy target hit.

130206.name: Attack
130206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130207.name: Manifesto of Purest Virtue
130207.desc: After using the Technique, enemies in a set area are inflicted with Daze for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Dazed enemies will not actively attack the team.\nWhen attacking a Dazed enemy to enter combat, deals Physical DMG to all enemies equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Argenti's ATK and regenerates his Energy by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.
130207.simple_desc: Inflicts Daze on all enemies within a set area. When attacking a Dazed enemy to enter combat, deals minor Physical DMG to all enemies and regenerates energy for Argenti.

130214.name: Merit Bestowed in "My" Garden
130214.desc: Consumes <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy and deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Argenti's ATK to all enemies. And further deals DMG for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> extra time(s), with each time dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Argenti's ATK to a random enemy.
130214.simple_desc: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> Energy and deals Physical DMG to all enemies and additionally deals minor Physical DMG to random single enemy targets for 6 Bounces.

1.point_desc: At the start of a turn, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Apotheosis.
When enemy targets enter combat, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for self.
Deals <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies whose HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or less.
